query_normalized: assessing the sensitivity of regression coefficients to dataset subset selection statistics
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's question by investigating algorithms to identify small dataset subsets whose removal significantly alters regression coefficients (specifically reversing their sign), which is a core mechanism of assessing coefficient sensitivity to subset selection. It satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by measuring the same biological/algorithmic mechanism (sensitivity of coefficients to data removal) and providing empirical baselines for the variables involved (subset size
